admins.isAdmin: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT userId FROM admins WHERE userId = ?);

fetch.post: SELECT userId, title, content FROM posts WHERE id = ?;
fetch.allPosts: SELECT id, title, content FROM posts;

users.create: INSERT INTO users (username, passhash) VALUES (?, ?) RETURNING id;

fetch.username: SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = ?;
fetch.info: SELECT username, passhash FROM users WHERE id = ?;

sessions.create: INSERT INTO sessions (id, userId) VALUES (?, ?) RETURNING id, userId, createdAt;
sessions.fetch: SELECT id, userId, createdAt FROM sessions WHERE id = ?;

bans.isBanned: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT userId FROM bans WHERE userId = ?);
